title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Burger King India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Burger King India
jsonLd.description:
Burger King India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Burger King India:
Burger King India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Burger King India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
